results.justification: EXACT TWIN — rubric-based + per-criterion + bias-correction + IRT calibration IS the 5-property × 2-state evaluation matrix mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — multi-dim rubric + LLM distributions + personalized calibration IS the 5-property + 10-template diagnostic mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — 15 evaluation metrics + multi-dim accuracy/calibration/robustness/fairness/toxicity IS the 5-property × 2-state matrix + 10-template classification mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — perturbation-stability + hidden-state probing + answer-stability calibration IS the wrist-site minimal-perturbation probe mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — epistemic + aleatoric uncertainty + perturbation + aggregation IS the 2-movement-2-pause oscillation + cross-modal synthesis mechanism.
Input perturbation + robustness eval overlaps with wrist-site minimal-perturbation probe mechanism.
Multi-modal cross-modal aggregation overlaps with 4-modal cross-synthesis mechanism.
LLM perturbation evaluation + measurement overlaps with minimal-perturbation probe + diagnostic interpretation mechanism.
